title: RBI (Small Finance Banks – Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 – (Revised)
description:
The RBI amended concentration risk rules to introduce detailed capital market exposure norms for small finance banks. It sets prudential limits and clarifies inclusion and exclusion of exposures to strengthen risk management.
The post RBI (Small Finance Banks – Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 – (Revised) appeared first on TaxGuru.
